source_name: UK Statutory RSHE — Full Programme (DfE July 2025)

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify and name body parts using correct anatomical terms.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot name basic body parts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some basic body parts with prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Names most body parts but may use incorrect terms.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Confidently identifies and names body parts using correct anatomical terminology.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Uses precise anatomical terms consistently and accurately.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain which body parts are private.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify private body parts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of privacy with support.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most private parts but explanations lack clarity.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains which body parts are private and why this matters.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of body privacy concepts.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must know correct anatomical terms before they can meaningfully understand which body parts are private.

criteria.criterion_statement: Learners can articulate their personal boundaries regarding physical contact and privacy in clear, age-appropriate language.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot express any personal boundaries.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some boundaries but struggles to communicate them clearly.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Communicates basic boundaries with some clarity and appropriate language.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly articulates personal boundaries using confident, age-appropriate language in various contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Articulates boundaries with nuanced understanding of different situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding which body parts are private is foundational to articulating personal boundaries regarding physical contact and privacy.

criteria.criterion_statement: Apply foundational relationship skills to build and maintain positive connections with others.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No demonstration of relationship-building skills.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of positive relationship elements.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some foundational skills with guidance to build connections.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies foundational relationship skills to build and maintain positive connections effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts relationship skills flexibly across diverse social contexts.

criteria.criterion_statement: Apply safety knowledge to keep themselves and others safe in relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No demonstration of safety awareness.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of safety concepts in relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some safety knowledge with guidance in relationship contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies safety knowledge to protect themselves and others in relationships effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated safety reasoning across complex relationship scenarios.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can use appropriate skills to manage difficult feelings such as disappointment or anger in friendship situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No strategies demonstrated for managing difficult feelings.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of difficult feelings but limited management strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Uses some appropriate strategies to manage difficult feelings with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies effective strategies to manage difficult feelings like disappointment or anger in friendships.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts and refines emotion management strategies across varied challenging situations.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can reflect on how to demonstrate kind behaviors when navigating complex or challenging relationship situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No reflection on kind behaviors shown.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of kindness but limited reflection on application.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Reflects on some kind behaviors with support in challenging situations.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Thoughtfully reflects on and identifies appropriate kind behaviors for complex relationship challenges.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated reflection on kindness strategies across diverse relationship contexts.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify different types of family structures and their defining characteristics.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any family types or characteristics.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies one or two basic family types with minimal detail.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several family types and describes some key characteristics accurately.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Identifies diverse family structures and describes their characteristics, including legal and social aspects comprehensively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyses complex family dynamics and explains how structures evolve over time.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify different forms of abuse including emotional, physical, sexual, domestic, and exploitative abuse.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any forms of abuse.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic physical abuse but struggles with other forms.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most common forms of abuse with some gaps in understanding.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies various forms of abuse including emotional, physical, sexual, domestic and exploitative types.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies complex abuse patterns and understands interconnected forms.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can recognise when situations are unsafe or harmful including online risks and family relationship concerns.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot recognise unsafe situations.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Recognises obvious physical dangers but misses subtle risks.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises most unsafe situations but may miss online or emotional risks.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately recognises unsafe situations across physical, online and relationship contexts including reporting needs.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Recognises complex risk patterns and anticipates potential dangers.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain personal rights and legal protections related to safety and abuse.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic personal rights or protections.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some personal rights but explanations are unclear or incomplete.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains basic personal rights and some legal protections with minor gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains personal rights, boundaries, and key legal protections including recognition of children as abuse victims.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains rights and protections with detailed understanding of legal frameworks.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain how to seek help and support when safety is compromised.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify help-seeking options or support systems.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some sources of help but explanations lack clarity.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains basic help-seeking processes with some understanding of support systems.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how to seek help, including reporting procedures and accessing medical attention when needed.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains comprehensive help-seeking strategies including multiple support pathways and professional services.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify the key characteristics that make friendships positive, caring, and supportive.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any friendship characteristics.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies one or two basic friendship characteristics with prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several friendship characteristics but may miss key elements.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies multiple key characteristics of positive, caring, and supportive friendships.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies comprehensive range of friendship characteristics with nuanced understanding.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how healthy friendships work, including their challenges and how they can be maintained.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain friendship dynamics or challenges.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Provides basic explanation of how friendships work with significant gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some aspects of friendship dynamics but lacks depth or completeness.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how healthy friendships function, including ups and downs and resolution strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Provides sophisticated explanation of friendship dynamics with insightful understanding of complexities.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must first identify characteristics of positive friendships before they can explain how healthy friendships work.

criteria.criterion_statement: Apply strategies to build caring, kind friendships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No strategies demonstrated for building friendships.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of friendship-building strategies but application is limited.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some appropriate strategies to build caring friendships with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies effective strategies to build caring, kind friendships independently.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Models excellent friendship-building strategies and supports others.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding how healthy friendships work is necessary before applying strategies to build them.

criteria.criterion_statement: Recognise when a friendship is unhealthy and respond appropriately to get support.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify unhealthy friendship signs or responses.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of unhealthy friendship signs but responses are unclear.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some unhealthy friendship signs and knows basic support-seeking responses.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly recognises unhealthy friendship patterns and responds appropriately to seek support when needed.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated recognition of friendship issues and proactive support-seeking.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must understand healthy friendship characteristics before they can recognize when a friendship is unhealthy.

criteria.criterion_statement: Learners can communicate assertively to express their needs and set appropriate boundaries in relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No demonstration of assertive communication or boundary setting.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic attempts at expressing needs with limited clarity or confidence.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Clear expression of needs and boundaries with some assertiveness in familiar contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Confident assertive communication expressing needs and setting appropriate boundaries across different relationship contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Skilled assertive communication adapting approach effectively to complex interpersonal situations.

criteria.criterion_statement: Learners can manage their emotions effectively when communicating needs and navigating relationship challenges.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No evidence of emotional management during interpersonal challenges.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness of emotions with limited management strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Some ability to manage emotions like disappointment and frustration in relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effective emotional regulation when expressing needs and managing relationship complexities and disappointments.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Sophisticated emotional management supporting healthy relationships and personal growth.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify different types of bullying including online bullying.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any types of bullying.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies one or two basic types of bullying.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several types of bullying with some gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies multiple types of bullying including online forms.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies comprehensive range of bullying types with nuanced understanding.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify what stereotypes are and how they can be unfair, negative, destructive or lead to bullying.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify what stereotypes are.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic recognition of stereotypes with limited understanding.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies stereotypes and recognises some harmful aspects.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies stereotypes and explains how they can be harmful or lead to bullying.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of stereotypes and their destructive potential.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain the harmful impacts of bullying on individuals and communities.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain any impacts of bullying.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Explains basic or obvious impacts with limited detail.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains several impacts with some understanding of consequences.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains multiple harmful impacts of bullying on individuals and communities.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains comprehensive range of impacts with sophisticated understanding of consequences.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must first identify what bullying is before they can explain its harmful impacts.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can challenge stereotypes using appropriate strategies and reasoning.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No attempt to challenge stereotypes.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Recognises stereotypes but struggles to challenge them effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Challenges stereotypes with basic reasoning but lacks consistency or depth.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently challenges stereotypes using clear reasoning and appropriate strategies for the context.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Challenges stereotypes with sophisticated reasoning and adapts approach to different situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must understand what stereotypes are and their negative effects before they can challenge them effectively.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can seek appropriate help when bullying occurs or when concerned about safety.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No awareness of help-seeking options.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Limited awareness of who to approach for help.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some appropriate sources of help but may lack confidence in approach.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Confidently identifies and approaches appropriate sources of help using effective communication strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated judgment in selecting help sources and advocates effectively for self or others.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify online risks including fake profiles, inappropriate content, scams, and dangers from unknown contacts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any online risks.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic risks like strangers online.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies multiple risks including fake profiles and inappropriate content.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Identifies comprehensive range of online risks including scams, fake content, and contact dangers.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies sophisticated risks including AI-generated content and deepfakes.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain safety principles for protecting personal information including privacy settings, sharing restrictions, and legal considerations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain any safety principles.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Explains basic privacy concepts like not sharing passwords.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains privacy settings and permanence of online content.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains comprehensive safety principles including legal implications of image sharing and privacy controls.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains sophisticated safety principles including legal consequences and permanent digital footprints.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain safety principles for navigating digital relationships including respectful behavior and appropriate boundaries.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain relationship safety principles.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Explains basic online respect like being polite.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains respectful behavior and seeking help when concerned.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains comprehensive relationship safety including behavior expectations and support seeking strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains sophisticated relationship safety including content impact on behavior and attitudes.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can critically evaluate online relationships and sources of information to assess their trustworthiness and safety.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No evaluation of online relationships or sources.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness that online relationships need checking.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Simple evaluation using obvious safety indicators.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Systematic evaluation using multiple criteria to assess trustworthiness and safety risks.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Sophisticated analysis considering subtle manipulation tactics.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Basic identification of online risks must precede critical evaluation of online relationships and information sources.
Understanding safety principles for personal information supports critical evaluation of online relationships.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify harmful online content, contact, and situations including deepfakes, scams, and abusive behaviour.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot recognise harmful online situations.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies obvious threats with prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises common harmful content and contact patterns.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies diverse threats including sophisticated deception techniques.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Anticipates emerging threats and manipulation methods.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can apply appropriate response strategies including reporting procedures and seeking support when encountering online threats.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No appropriate responses to online threats.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness of need to seek help.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Uses simple response strategies with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Selects and implements appropriate responses including reporting and support-seeking.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts response strategies to complex situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must identify harmful online content and situations before they can apply appropriate response strategies.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can distinguish between trustworthy and untrustworthy people based on their behaviour and intentions.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify trustworthy versus untrustworthy people.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that some people may not be trustworthy.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies obvious signs of trustworthy and untrustworthy behaviour with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately distinguishes trustworthy from untrustworthy people using multiple behavioural indicators and contextual cues.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates complex trustworthiness scenarios including deceptive appearances.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can recognise unsafe situations and inappropriate contact in various contexts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify unsafe situations or inappropriate contact.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that some situations may be unsafe.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies obvious unsafe situations and inappropriate contact with support.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately recognises unsafe situations and inappropriate contact across multiple contexts including online environments.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates subtle safety risks and complex inappropriate contact scenarios.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can respond safely and appropriately when encountering potentially unsafe people or situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot demonstrate safe responses to unsafe encounters.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic understanding of need for safe responses.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Demonstrates simple safe responses to obvious unsafe situations with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Implements appropriate safety responses across various contexts including seeking help when needed.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts safety responses to complex scenarios and helps others respond safely.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Distinguishing between trustworthy and untrustworthy people is essential for responding safely to potentially unsafe situations.
Recognizing unsafe situations is a prerequisite for responding safely and appropriately to them.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can use appropriate vocabulary to describe safety concerns, abuse, or feelings of being unsafe.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot use safety vocabulary appropriately.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Uses basic safety words with significant prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Uses some appropriate safety vocabulary with minor prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Uses clear, appropriate vocabulary to describe safety concerns and feelings of being unsafe.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Uses precise safety vocabulary confidently in various contexts.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify appropriate sources of help and use proper channels to report safety concerns.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify help sources or reporting channels.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic help sources with significant guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some appropriate help sources and reporting methods.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Identifies appropriate help sources and uses proper channels to report safety concerns effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Strategically selects optimal help sources and reporting channels.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Having appropriate vocabulary to describe safety concerns is necessary before identifying and using proper reporting channels.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain the foundational elements of healthy romantic relationships including consent, boundaries, mutual respect, trust, and communication.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify relationship elements
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some basic relationship elements with limited understanding
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains several key elements but connections unclear
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how consent, boundaries, respect and trust create healthy relationships
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates nuanced understanding of interconnected relationship foundations

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how power dynamics and equality affect romantic relationships and ethical behaviour.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify power dynamics
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that power differences exist
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some effects of power imbalances on relationships
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how power dynamics impact ethical behaviour and relationship equality
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of subtle power influences

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how stereotypes and external influences like pornography can negatively impact romantic relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify external influences
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that outside factors affect relationships
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some negative effects of stereotypes or media
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how stereotypes and pornography can harm relationship dynamics
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates nuanced understanding of multiple harmful external influences

criteria.criterion_statement: I can evaluate how stereotypes, power imbalances, and cultural influences affect relationship dynamics.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No evaluation of relationship influences shown.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic recognition of some stereotypes or cultural influences on relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies multiple influences but evaluation lacks depth or connection to dynamics.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly evaluates how stereotypes, power imbalances, and cultural factors shape relationship patterns and interactions.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Sophisticated analysis connecting multiple influences to complex relationship dynamics.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding foundational elements of healthy relationships supports evaluation of how external factors affect relationship dynamics.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can apply strategies for managing conflict and relationship endings.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No strategies for conflict or endings demonstrated.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows awareness of need for strategies but application is unclear.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies basic strategies with some effectiveness in straightforward situations.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively applies appropriate strategies for managing conflict and endings with kindness and emotional awareness.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Skillfully adapts multiple strategies to complex relationship challenges.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can recognise consent and boundaries in relationships including early romantic and sexual relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify consent or boundary indicators.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic consent signals with significant support and prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises clear consent and boundary indicators in straightforward relationship scenarios.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies consent and boundaries across various relationship contexts including romantic and sexual situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyses subtle consent and boundary dynamics in complex relationship scenarios.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Basic understanding of personal boundaries must precede learning about consent in romantic and sexual relationships.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can respect consent and boundaries in relationships including early romantic and sexual relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Does not demonstrate respectful boundary behaviour.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic respect for clear boundaries with guidance and reminders.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Consistently respects explicit consent and boundaries in familiar relationship contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Demonstrates respectful behaviour toward consent and boundaries across various relationship situations including romantic contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Models exemplary respect for consent while supporting others' boundary-setting.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can communicate consent and boundaries in relationships including early romantic and sexual relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot express personal boundaries or consent.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Communicates basic personal boundaries with significant support and clear prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Clearly expresses personal consent and boundaries in straightforward relationship situations.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively communicates consent and boundaries across various relationship contexts including romantic and sexual situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Articulates nuanced consent and boundary communications in complex relationship scenarios.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain the principles of sexual consent including that it can be given, withheld or removed at any time.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain consent principles.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic understanding that consent exists but unclear about key principles.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some consent principles but misses key aspects like withdrawal.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains consent can be given, withheld or removed, with understanding of broader considerations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensive explanation linking consent to care, respect and contextual factors.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Basic recognition of consent and boundaries must precede detailed explanation of sexual consent principles.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain contraceptive options including efficacy, availability, and proper use of male and female condoms.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No understanding of contraceptive methods shown.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some contraceptive methods with limited detail.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes several contraceptive options with basic understanding of effectiveness.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains range of contraceptive choices including efficacy rates and proper condom use.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Compares contraceptive methods considering individual circumstances and access.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain pregnancy options including keeping the baby, adoption, and abortion with accurate medical and legal information.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No understanding of pregnancy options demonstrated.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Aware some pregnancy options exist with minimal detail.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes basic pregnancy options with some accurate information.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains all pregnancy options with medically and legally accurate information.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Discusses pregnancy options considering individual circumstances and support needs.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain STI prevention methods, testing importance, prevalence, impacts, and treatment facts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No understanding of STI prevention shown.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness of STI risks with limited prevention knowledge.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes some STI prevention methods and understands testing importance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains comprehensive STI prevention including safer sex, PrEP/PEP, testing, and treatment facts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Discusses STI prevention considering stigma, accessibility, and individual risk factors.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain reproductive health facts including fertility, menopause, menstrual problems, and lifestyle impacts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No understanding of reproductive health facts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness of some reproductive health concepts.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes key reproductive health facts with some understanding of impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains reproductive health including fertility, menopause, menstrual problems, and lifestyle factors.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Discusses reproductive health considering individual variations and when to seek help.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain how sexual and relationship choices affect overall health and wellbeing across multiple dimensions.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No understanding of health impacts shown.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness that choices affect health in some ways.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes some connections between sexual choices and health outcomes.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains how sexual and relationship choices affect physical, emotional, mental, and reproductive health.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyzes complex interactions between choices and multiple health dimensions.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain where and how to access confidential sexual health support, advice, and treatment services.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No knowledge of support services shown.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness that support services exist somewhere.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes some sexual health support options with limited detail.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains how and where to access confidential sexual health advice and support services.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Discusses support access considering barriers, confidentiality, and individual needs.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can evaluate the medical accuracy and reliability of sexual health information from various sources.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot assess information reliability
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some obvious inaccuracies with guidance
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Evaluates basic credibility markers but misses subtle misinformation
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Systematically evaluates sources using medical accuracy criteria and identifies reliable information
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Critically analyses complex misinformation patterns and source credibility

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding contraceptive facts provides foundation for evaluating medical accuracy of sexual health information.
Understanding STI facts provides foundation for evaluating medical accuracy of sexual health information.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can signpost others towards medically accurate sexual health information and support services.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot direct others to resources
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Suggests basic resources with prompting
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies appropriate sources but lacks specificity for individual needs
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively directs others to relevant, credible sexual health resources and services
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Tailors signposting to specific contexts and individual circumstances

criteria.criterion_statement: I can counter sexual health misinformation using evidence-based responses and alternative sources.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot challenge false information
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Recognises misinformation but struggles to respond
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Attempts to correct misinformation but lacks supporting evidence
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively challenges misinformation with accurate facts and credible alternatives
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Strategically counters misinformation while maintaining respectful dialogue

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must be able to evaluate medical accuracy before they can effectively counter misinformation.

criteria.criterion_statement: Identify and recognise the range of emotions that people experience in different situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot name or identify basic emotions.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some basic emotions but struggles to connect them to situations.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies common emotions and links some to appropriate situations or contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies a range of emotions and explains when they might be experienced in different situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates nuanced understanding of emotional complexity and situational triggers.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain mental health concepts including the distinction between normal feelings and mental health conditions.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Shows no understanding of mental health concepts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that mental health exists but limited understanding of concepts.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some mental health concepts but may confuse normal feelings with conditions.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains mental health concepts and distinguishes between normal feelings and mental health conditions.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of mental health complexity and nuanced distinctions.

criteria.criterion_statement: Describe factors and activities that support or harm mental wellbeing and happiness.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify factors affecting wellbeing.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names few factors that affect wellbeing with limited understanding of impact.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes several factors affecting wellbeing and shows some understanding of their effects.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately describes range of factors that support or harm wellbeing and explains their impacts clearly.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates comprehensive understanding of complex wellbeing factors and their interconnections.

criteria.criterion_statement: Identify appropriate sources of help and support for mental health concerns.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify help sources.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names very few appropriate sources of help with limited understanding of when to seek help.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some appropriate help sources and shows basic understanding of when to use them.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies range of appropriate help sources and explains when and how to access support.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates comprehensive knowledge of help-seeking pathways and support systems.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can recognise and accurately describe emotional states in myself and others using appropriate vocabulary.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic emotions in self or others.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies simple emotions with basic vocabulary.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises range of emotions using varied vocabulary appropriately.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies and describes complex emotional states in self and others using precise, sensitive vocabulary.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates nuanced emotional recognition with sophisticated vocabulary.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Identifying emotions in different situations is foundational to recognizing and describing emotional states in oneself and others.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can judge whether emotional responses and behaviours are appropriate and when support is needed.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot assess appropriateness of emotional responses.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Makes basic judgments about obvious emotional concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Evaluates emotional responses and identifies clear support triggers.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately judges appropriateness of emotions and behaviours, recognising when professional support is needed.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Makes sophisticated judgments about complex emotional situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding mental health concepts is necessary before judging whether emotional responses are appropriate.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can seek help and communicate about mental health concerns appropriately and sensitively.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot seek help for mental health concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Seeks basic help with prompting for obvious concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Initiates help-seeking and communicates concerns with some sensitivity.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively seeks appropriate help and communicates about mental health using accurate, sensitive language.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated help-seeking and mental health communication skills.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify the risks of online activities and their impact on wellbeing.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any digital risks or impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic digital risks with limited understanding of impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several digital risks and some impacts on wellbeing with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies various digital risks and explains their impacts on personal and others' wellbeing.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensively identifies complex digital risks and analyses their multifaceted wellbeing impacts.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify the benefits of online activities and their impact on wellbeing.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any digital benefits or impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic digital benefits with limited understanding of impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several digital benefits and some impacts on wellbeing with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies various digital benefits and explains their positive impacts on personal and others' wellbeing.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensively identifies digital benefits and analyses their complex positive impacts on wellbeing.

criteria.criterion_statement: Evaluate online content critically to determine its appropriateness and reliability.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot assess online content quality or appropriateness.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that online content varies in quality.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some criteria to evaluate content but inconsistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Systematically evaluates content using multiple criteria for appropriateness and reliability.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates content with sophisticated critical thinking skills.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Identifying online risks supports critical evaluation of online content appropriateness.

criteria.criterion_statement: Evaluate online relationships and their impact on personal wellbeing and in-person connections.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot assess online relationship quality or impact.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic understanding of online relationship differences.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some pros and cons of online relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Thoughtfully evaluates how online relationships complement or conflict with in-person connections.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates nuanced understanding of relationship dynamics across contexts.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding benefits of online activities supports evaluation of online relationships and their wellbeing impact.

criteria.criterion_statement: Identify appropriate support resources and reporting mechanisms for online safety concerns.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify support resources for online issues.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Knows some adults can help with online problems.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies basic support options but may lack specificity.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies appropriate support resources and reporting procedures for various online concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates comprehensive knowledge of support systems and procedures.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about nutrition, including caloric content, characteristics of healthy and poor diets, and associated health risks.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic nutritional facts or diet-health connections.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some basic nutritional facts but with significant gaps or inaccuracies.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most key nutritional facts and some diet-health connections with minor gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies comprehensive nutritional facts, diet characteristics, and associated health risks including obesity and cardiovascular disease.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates detailed nutritional knowledge with sophisticated understanding of diet-health relationships.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about physical activity requirements, benefits, and the health risks of inactive lifestyles.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify physical activity requirements or health connections.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some basic physical activity facts but with significant gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most physical activity requirements and some health benefits with minor gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies physical activity guidelines, practical implementation strategies, and health risks of inactivity including cardiovascular disease.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates comprehensive understanding of physical activity science and diverse implementation approaches.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about substance use including legal and illegal drugs, alcohol, smoking, vaping, and associated health risks.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify substance use facts or health risks.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some basic substance facts but with significant gaps or inaccuracies.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most key substance facts and some associated risks with minor gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies comprehensive facts about legal/illegal substances, consumption guidelines, addiction risks, and health consequences including cancer and mental health impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates detailed substance knowledge including safety strategies and harm reduction approaches.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about hygiene practices, infection prevention, dental health, and sleep requirements for health maintenance.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic health maintenance practices or requirements.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some health maintenance facts but with significant gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most health maintenance practices and some health connections with minor gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies comprehensive health maintenance facts including hygiene, dental care, sleep requirements, infection prevention, and screening benefits.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates detailed understanding of health maintenance science and preventive care strategies.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify appropriate adults and healthcare professionals to contact for health concerns and support.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify appropriate health support contacts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some health support contacts but with significant gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most appropriate health support contacts with minor gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies comprehensive range of appropriate adults and healthcare professionals for various health concerns and support needs.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of healthcare system navigation and support networks.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about reproductive and sexual health including pre-conception health, pelvic floor health, and pregnancy-related information.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify reproductive health facts or requirements.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some reproductive health facts but with significant gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most reproductive health facts with minor gaps or inaccuracies.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies key reproductive health facts including pre-conception care, pelvic floor health, and pregnancy loss support information.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates comprehensive understanding of reproductive health across different life stages.

criteria.criterion_statement: The learner can determine when health support is needed by recognising concerning symptoms or situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify when health support is needed.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies obvious health concerns requiring immediate support.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises most situations where health support would be beneficial.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately determines when health support is needed across various scenarios and symptom presentations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates complex health situations and anticipates support needs.

criteria.criterion_statement: The learner can identify appropriate sources of health support and explain how to access them effectively.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify sources of health support.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names basic health support sources like parents or doctors.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies multiple appropriate sources and basic access methods.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains how to effectively access various health support sources including trusted adults and healthcare professionals.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates best support options for specific situations and contexts.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Determining when health support is needed must precede identifying appropriate sources and access methods.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify appropriate healthcare services for different health needs and situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any healthcare services.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic healthcare services with significant gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most healthcare services but with some confusion about appropriateness.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies appropriate healthcare services for various health needs and situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies services and explains nuanced appropriateness factors.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how to access different healthcare services.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain access procedures.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Explains basic access steps with major gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains most access procedures but lacks some detail or accuracy.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how to access various healthcare services including practical steps.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains access procedures and addresses potential barriers.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Identifying appropriate healthcare services is necessary before explaining how to access them.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain the legal framework for medical consent for children under 16, including parental responsibility and Gillick competence.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No understanding of under-16 consent rules.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness that parents consent for children under 16.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Understands parental responsibility but limited knowledge of Gillick competence.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains parental consent responsibility and Gillick competence as exceptions for mature minors.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyses complex scenarios involving Gillick competence assessment.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain circumstances where individuals over 16 may lack capacity to make medical treatment decisions.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No understanding of capacity limitations over 16.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness that some over-16s cannot consent.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some circumstances affecting capacity in over-16s.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains various circumstances that may impair decision-making capacity in those over 16.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyses complex capacity assessment scenarios and legal implications.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify potential hazards and safety risks in different environments and situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic safety hazards or risks.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies obvious hazards in familiar environments with prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies common hazards and risks in familiar environments independently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Identifies potential hazards and assesses safety risks across different environments and situations effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies subtle risks and anticipates hazards in complex or unfamiliar situations.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can implement safety strategies in various environments including roads, railways, water, and unfamiliar social or work settings.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No safety strategies demonstrated.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic safety awareness with significant support needed.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Some safety strategies applied with occasional guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently implements appropriate safety strategies across different environments independently.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts safety strategies effectively to novel situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Identifying potential hazards and safety risks is foundational to implementing safety strategies in various environments.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can recognise and manage peer influence in relation to risk-taking behaviour and personal safety.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No recognition of peer influence.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Limited awareness of peer pressure situations.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises peer influence but struggles to manage it.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively recognises and manages peer influence in safety-related situations consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Helps others recognise and manage peer influence.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can seek appropriate help when facing safety concerns including grooming, exploitation, or other threats.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No help-seeking demonstrated.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Recognises need for help but unsure how.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Seeks help with prompting in some situations.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Independently identifies when help is needed and accesses appropriate support sources.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Guides others in effective help-seeking strategies.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can apply conflict resolution and decision-making skills in contexts involving conflict and violence.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No conflict resolution skills shown.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness of conflict situations.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Attempts conflict resolution with mixed success.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies effective self-management and decision-making skills in conflict situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Models advanced conflict resolution for others.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain the physical changes that occur during puberty and adolescence.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No explanation of puberty changes provided.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Lists some physical changes with minimal explanation.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains several physical changes with basic understanding of timing.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains multiple physical changes during puberty with accurate understanding of development patterns.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensively explains physical changes with connections to individual variation.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify when physical or mental health issues require attention.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify health concerns requiring attention.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies obvious physical health issues but misses mental health concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies clear physical and mental health issues with some prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies when physical and mental health issues require professional attention or intervention.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies subtle health concerns and explains urgency levels appropriately.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding normal physical changes during puberty helps students identify when health issues require attention.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can apply strategies to protect my own health and wellbeing.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot apply health protection strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Applies basic strategies with significant guidance and support.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some appropriate strategies but may miss key protective measures.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies effective strategies to protect physical and mental health and wellbeing.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts and combines strategies effectively for different health situations.
